content: Dan pulled the pick-up truck out of the mud with his huge tow truck.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Amastan (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Dan ha tirato il pick-up fuori dal fango con il suo enorme carro attrezzi
